lede: A look at October 19 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Dmitry of Uglich and Trey Parker, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Hurricane Wilma
events.desc: Hurricane Wilma becomes the most intense Atlantic hurricane on record with a minimum pressure of 882 mb.

events.title: Saddam Hussein
events.desc: Saddam Hussein goes on trial in Baghdad for crimes against humanity.

events.title: 1988–1994 British broadcasting voice restrictions
events.desc: The British government imposes a broadcasting ban on television and radio interviews with members of Sinn Féin and eleven Irish republican and Ulster loyalist paramilitary groups.

events.title: Korean War
events.desc: Korean War: The Battle of Pyongyang ends in a United Nations victory. Hours later, the Chinese Army begins crossing the border into Korea.

events.title: World War I
events.desc: World War I: The First Battle of Ypres begins.

events.title: Max Planck
events.desc: Max Planck discovers Planck's law of black-body radiation.

events.title: American Civil War
events.desc: American Civil War: The Battle of Cedar Creek ends the last Confederate threat to Washington, DC.

events.title: American Revolutionary War
events.desc: American Revolutionary War: The siege of Yorktown comes to an end.

events.title: San Felipe incident (1596)
events.desc: The Spanish ship San Felipe runs aground on the coast of Japan and its cargo is confiscated by local authorities.

events.title: Second Punic War
events.desc: Second Punic War: At the Battle of Zama, Roman legions under Scipio Africanus defeat Hannibal Barca, leader of the army defending Carthage.[citation needed]

births.name: Trey Parker
births.line: American actor, animator, producer, and screenwriter

births.name: Miguel Ángel Asturias
births.line: Guatemalan journalist, author, and poet, Nobel Prize laureate

deaths.text: Winifred Asprey, American mathematician and computer scientist
Ernest Rutherford, New Zealand-English physicist and chemist, Nobel Prize laureate

observances.text: Christian feast day: Aaron (Coptic Orthodox Church of Alexandria)
Christian feast day: Isaac Jogues, Jean de Brébeuf, and Companions
Christian feast day: Paul of the Cross
